metadata.title: Build an SRX ACE v3 agent that ingests high-urgency, low-context compliance evidence requests from a European Union law firm operator, applies sovereign_lens validation gates, and produces a governed artifact with explicit validation gates for SR8 compilation.

mission.primary_objective: Build an SRX ACE v3 agent that ingests high-urgency, low-context compliance evidence requests from a European Union law firm operator, applies sovereign_lens validation gates, and produces a governed artifact with explicit validation gates for SR8 compilation.
mission.success_definition: Agent correctly parses and normalizes at least 90% of chaotic input fields.; All validation gates are triggered and logged for audit.; Output artifact contains all required SR8 sections (Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract).; No false positives or false negatives in sovereign_lens compliance checks.; Agent completes processing within 5 seconds per request.

in_scope.item: The agent shall accept raw, messy input (missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria), parse and normalize it into structured compliance evidence fields, apply sovereign_lens rules (GDPR, EU data sovereignty, legal privilege), enforce explicit validation gates at each processing stage, and output a compiled SR8 directive with Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, and Output Contract sections.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: Agent correctly parses and normalizes at least 90% of chaotic input fields.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: All validation gates are triggered and logged for audit.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: Output artifact contains all required SR8 sections (Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract).

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: No false positives or false negatives in sovereign_lens compliance checks.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 5
gate.pass_condition: Agent completes processing within 5 seconds per request.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

execution_laws.item: Must comply with EU GDPR and data sovereignty regulations.
Must handle high-urgency, low-context input without hallucinating missing data.
Must not expose or log sensitive legal-client information.
Validation gates must be explicit and auditable.
Output must be strict JSON with no markdown fences.
Must operate within Codex runtime environment.

implementation_contract.item: The agent shall accept raw, messy input (missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria), parse and normalize it into structured compliance evidence fields, apply sovereign_lens rules (GDPR, EU data sovereignty, legal privilege), enforce explicit validation gates at each processing stage, and output a compiled SR8 directive with Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, and Output Contract sections.

verification_contract.item: Agent correctly parses and normalizes at least 90% of chaotic input fields.
All validation gates are triggered and logged for audit.
Output artifact contains all required SR8 sections (Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract).
No false positives or false negatives in sovereign_lens compliance checks.
Agent completes processing within 5 seconds per request.

receipt_contract.item: sections: artifact_type; depth_tier; runtime_target; should_block; blocked_reason; compiled_intent
compiled_intent_structure: Objective: string; Scope: string; Constraints: array of strings; Success Criteria: array of strings; Output Contract: object with format and sections

validation_gates: gate_1: input_parsing_and_normalization; gate_2: sovereign_lens_compliance_check; gate_3: constraint_enforcement; gate_4: success_criteria_verification; gate_5: output_contract_validation

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
